# Indian Restaurants in USA
> The most complete directory of Indian restaurants across the United States, with regional cuisine and dietary filtering not found on any other platform.

## Purpose
This site helps people find Indian restaurants in the USA filtered by:
- Regional Indian cuisine (North Indian, South Indian, Hyderabadi, Gujarati, Indo-Chinese, etc.)
- Dietary needs (Jain, pure vegetarian, vegan, halal, gluten-free)
- Location (state, city, metro area)

## Key Pages
- `/` — Homepage with search, cuisine chips, dietary filters, and featured metros
- `/restaurants/[slug]` — Individual restaurant listings with hours, ratings, cuisine/dietary tags
- `/usa/[state]/indian-restaurants` — State hub pages
- `/usa/[state]/[city]/indian-restaurants` — City hub pages
- `/indian-food/[cuisine]` — Regional cuisine hubs
- `/indian-restaurants/[diet]` — Dietary filter hubs
- `/best-indian-restaurants` — Hidden gem algorithm results
- `/map` — Interactive map of all published restaurants
- `/guides/[slug]` — Expert guides to Indian food in America
- `/data/[report]` — Original research on Indian restaurant density

## Cuisine Taxonomy
north-indian, south-indian, indo-chinese, punjabi, gujarati, bengali, hyderabadi, mughlai, kerala, chaat, rajasthani, maharashtrian

## Dietary Taxonomy
pure-veg, vegan, jain, halal, gluten-free

## Data Methodology
Restaurant data is sourced from Google Places (via Outscraper). Regional cuisine and dietary tags are classified by Claude AI (Anthropic). Hidden gems are algorithmically identified: rating ≥ 4.5, reviews < 200, operational status confirmed.

## Priority Metros
Edison NJ, Bay Area CA, Chicago IL, Houston TX, New York City NY, Dallas TX, Atlanta GA, DC-Northern Virginia, Seattle-Bellevue WA, Boston MA, Charlotte NC

## Contact
website: https://www.indianrestaurantsinusa.com
